meta.title: 7  Underrated AI Tools I Wish I Tried Sooner (Free & Paid)
meta.description:
7 Best AI Tools for Business to Make money in 2025

Google AI studio - https://aistudio.google.com/

Poppy AI https://start.getpoppy.ai/dankieft (use DAN for 25$ discount)
Getresponse - https://try.getresponsetoday.com/dankieft (30 day free trial)
Arcads AI - https://arcads.ai/?via=tryarcads 
Opus Clip - https://www.opus.pro/?via=dankieft
Manus AI - https://manus.im/app (sign up to waitlist)

In this video I show you the 7 best ai tools that I wish I tried sooner. These are free ai tools and paid ai tools. It’s a good mix of tools that are perfect for your business or for starting an online business and to make money with AI. With these AI tools you can learn to code, create AI youtube videos, ads and you can improve your productivity.


👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
